Coppa Italia Final on May 17

The Coppa Italia Final between Juventus and Lazio will be played on May 17, moved after the Bianconeri reached the Champions League Final.

Last night’s 2-1 victory over Monaco (4-1 on aggregate) allowed Max Allegri’s side to book their spot at the Final in Cardiff on June 3.

It will be against either Real Madrid or Atletico Madrid.

The original date of the Coppa Italia Final had been Friday June 2, only one day before the Champions League showdown.

With confirmation that Juventus will be involved in Cardiff, the Coppa Italia showdown has officially been moved to Wednesday May 17.

Juve are in line for the Treble, as they are one win away from clinching the Scudetto.

With Juventus looking for a winger and the Brazilian struggling for playing time, reports suggest that the Bianconeri will meet Bayern Munich in order to discuss a deal for Douglas Costa.

According to the Corriere dello Sport, Beppe Marotta and Fabio Paratici are to meet with officials from the Bavarian club to discuss the situation with Medhi Benatia and Kingsley Coman, but will also look to open talks for the 26-year-old.

Costa has long been a Juve target, but has found playing time difficult to come by under Carlo Ancelotti, making just 14 Bundesliga starts this term.

邦路斯：輸給羅馬的聯賽喚醒了祖雲達斯


在2-0擊敗拉素奪得意大利杯冠軍之後，祖雲達斯後衛邦路斯表示，輸給羅馬的比賽“喚醒了我們”，球隊重新找到了他們的勇氣。

憑藉艾維斯和邦路斯在上半場的進球，斑馬軍團在北京時間今天凌晨的奧林匹克體育場2-0擊敗拉素，連續三年奪得意大利杯冠軍，創造了新的歷史。

“這是一場艱難的比賽，但我們採取了正確的踢法，重新找回了我們的實力。上週日的失利給我們帶來了好處，喚醒了我們，現在我們必須專注於克羅托內，”邦路斯賽後告訴Rai Sport。

在上輪意甲聯賽中，斑馬軍團在領先一球的情況下1-3輸給羅馬，導致聯賽冠軍的慶典被延遲了。“對陣羅馬的下半場，我們並沒有發揮出自己的水平。我們行動遲緩，表現得不夠堅決，所以我們自己必須好好交談一下，準備好接下來20天的火熱賽事。”

“拉素在進攻線上很有實力，所以在一場決定勝負的比賽中獲得機會也是很正常的，但幸運的是超級尼圖今晚拯救了我們。我們知道，這才是真正的祖雲達斯。當我們沒有以正確的方式對陣羅馬時，輸球讓大家感到震驚，因為球迷們都已經學慣了獲勝，但這是一次我們需要的覺醒。”

“意大利杯讓那些沒有太多出場機會的球員們可以表現自己，我要感謝主教練和俱樂部，在這個賽季給球隊帶來瞭如此之高的實力和韌性。”

《倫敦晚旗報》報導，阿仙奴將展開對祖雲達斯中場利米拿的追逐，他的身價可能在2000萬英鎊左右。

據稱，阿仙奴想在轉會市場上尋找一名中場，這名23歲的加蓬球員是槍手最中意的人選。自2015年從馬賽加盟祖雲達斯以來，利米拿只正選了15場意甲比賽。但他被認為是一位有著和普巴同樣風格、身材和遠大未來的球員。

祖雲達斯願意與其他球會做交易，因為利米拿不是目前計劃中必要的成員。羅馬和史浩克04可能會成為阿仙奴引進他的障礙。利物浦曾在利米拿加盟祖雲前關注過他的動向，但目前高普的球隊還沒有對他重燃興趣的跡象。

阿仙奴尚未與祖雲達斯展開正式的談判，但利米拿成為阿仙奴的轉會目標是溫格可能與阿仙奴續約的又一信號，雲格在利米拿還在馬賽時就很看好他。利米拿的個人條款不太可能成為阿仙奴的障礙，他也願意登陸英超踢球。

邦路斯帶著大兒子Lorenzo 看了拖連奴的比賽，而拖連奴贈送給Lorenzo 一件特別的球衣。

第二單免簽

近日前鋒迪巴拉在接受意大利媒體採訪時透露自己正在苦練右腳。儘管這位阿根廷國腳一直以自己精湛的左腳技術聞名，但迪巴拉認為自己不能過於依賴左腳。

“我是一個左撇子，我連刷牙都用左手。”迪巴拉在接受意大利媒體《Il Venerdì》採訪時說道。

“我每天都帶著一支筆練習寫字，不過我是把筆夾在腳趾中間，用右腳來寫。”

“為了提高右腳的敏感度和能力，我就像個瘋子一樣在練習。不僅如此，我還在鍛煉我的視野。我希望能看得更遠，觀察不同方向的情況，更好地預判對手的和球路。”

“我在健身房也沒閒著，在意大利我學會了怎樣去防守。”

“當我還在巴勒莫的時候，當時的主帥加度素告訴我不用過度增重，我的腿部力量很足，沒必要把自己練成一個大隻佬。”

“C朗能攻入360球就是因為作為一個右腳球員他的左腳也很棒。只用一隻腳踢波總是很容易被盯死，而且防守球員也很容易就能看透你。”

“意甲的後衛可不是鬧著玩的，這裡是一座很棒的學校。”

迪巴拉還談到了他在都靈的生活，他表示一切都和在西西里島與巴勒莫很不一樣。

“我不介意有人找我簽名和合影。當然我會想到托迪，他就像活在監獄裡的國王，在羅馬他甚至不敢上街。”

“當我來到北部加盟祖雲之後我才發現意大利人也分很多種。在巴勒莫時我住在Mondello，我經常騎車出去兜風，去海邊閒逛，鄰居們都很照顧我。”

“我媽媽也和我住在一起，不管我缺點什麼東西鄰居們都會提供幫助。而都靈人更加干練謹慎，他們不怎麼搭理你。如果你家裡沒糖了，去找鄰居是毫無用處的，你最好還是自己去超市買。”

“我們阿根廷人感情都很豐富，我們需要家庭一樣的氛圍。所以這種矜持的態度讓我適應起來有點困難。”

“去球場的大巴上每個人都戴著耳機聽著自己的音樂，不過在阿根廷我們會用一個大音響用來放音樂。這聽起來有點粗魯，不過也很有趣。”

“我加盟球隊時保方熱情地歡迎了我，那個賽季初段情況很糟，輸給薩索羅之後我們前10輪已經輸了4場。”

“保方和我們談到了謙遜和責任感，他認為我們應為糟糕的表現感到羞恥。自那之後我就明白了，祖雲不會為自己的表現道歉，球隊永遠爭勝的信條也不會改變。 ”

迪巴拉模仿角斗士面具的慶祝動作已經成為了一種潮流，而他也解釋了這個動作的含義。

“由於我的失誤我們在多哈的意大利超級盃中輸給了AC米蘭。那段回憶可不太美好，當時我也很沮喪。看著周圍的隊友們我感到很愧疚，但最後我還是努力振作起來了。”

“當時我發了一段米高佐敦說過的話：'我經歷了失敗、失敗、再失敗，而這就是我成功的原因。'”

“我的慶祝動作源自於《帝國驕雄》。這部電影我看了不下30次，在生活中我們都必須像角斗士一樣奮起戰鬥。
”
“我理解很多外界的爭論，其實我覺得是沒必要的。比如他們總是拿我和美斯對比，我和他不是對手，我不用非要在場上過掉他。

他已經贏得了一切，而我也還在努力。”

“我想在國家隊和美斯一起贏，是和他一起，而不是取代他。”

意甲聯盟證實，從下個賽季開始，意甲聯賽的開球時間將出現變化，將會增設週一晚間的比賽。
2018至2021年的意甲轉播版權出售的競標工作即將開啟，意甲聯盟證實，為了方便電視轉播商，意甲將從下賽季開始施行新規，10場比賽將會被安排在8個不同的時間開賽，這一舉措無疑會讓球迷看到更多意甲比賽的直播。
下賽季的意甲，將在周六、週日和周一安排比賽，週六會有3場比賽，分別在當地時間15點、18點以及20點30分各安排1場比賽。
而在周日，12點30會有一場早場比賽，傳統的15點時段，只會有3場比賽同時開戰，之後的18點以及20點30分會各有一場比賽。
下週一晚間的20點30分，將會是每輪意甲聯賽的最後一場比賽。應該說，意甲聯盟的最新安排，基本上與目前的英超和西甲差不多。

古圖斯：保方很偉大，他具備很多特殊的特點
車路士門將古圖斯在接受採訪時稱讚了祖雲門將保方，他表示很多前鋒都畏懼這名意大利老將。
古圖斯在接受採訪時表示：“保方在這樣的年齡還能有這樣的表現真的非常偉大，我今年25歲，他比我大14歲，如果14年後我能有他這樣的表現，那我會非常滿意的。”
“傷病能夠改變一名球員的未來，我當然希望我的未來不會被傷病阻攔。我深愛著足球，我喜歡在球場、訓練場上的感覺。我希望10到15年後我還能有相同的感覺，希望那時我還能夠保持現在的水準。”
“保方不僅有很高的天賦和實力，他還有豐富的經驗以及領導力，而他強大的氣場也讓很多前鋒都懼怕他。如果你是一名偉大的門將，你也會擁有這樣的能力。我已經具備了某個方面的能力，但保方和卡斯拿斯這樣的門將仍然有很多不同於其他門將的特別的東西。”

Arsenal have agreed a €14m deal with Juventus for goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny, according to reports.

The goalkeeper has spent the last two years on loan at Roma, but Roma has no clauses which allow for them to control the player’s destiny.

In recent days, reports have circulated that Juventus want to make the Polish keeper the heir to Gianluigi Buffon once the legendary backstopper retires next season.

Transfer guru Gianluca Di Marzio is reporting that a deal has been agreed, with Juve set to pay €14m [£12.2m] plus €2m for the Polish international.

Szczesny has apparently agreed a four-year contract worth €4m per season, which would increase to €4.5m in the final year.

Di Marzio also stated that Juventus are extremely interested in the services of either Douglas Costa or Angel Di Maria this summer.

斑馬軍團對這名巴西球員感興趣的消息已經不是什麼秘密，哥斯達看來也不在拜仁主帥安索洛堤的計劃之內，兩傢球會有可能加快談判的速度。《都靈體育報》指出，祖雲的高層會在未來幾天飛到慕尼黑商談轉會的細節，雙方要達成交易的難度並不大。

據悉，祖雲的報價是3000萬歐元，此外還有與表現掛鉤的浮動條款。這個價格與2015年夏天拜仁從薩克達簽下他時的轉會費一樣。

本賽季杜格拉斯哥斯達一共出場34次，貢獻7球9助攻。哥斯達可以踢左右兩翼，或者在中鋒的身後進行支援，祖雲主帥艾歷尼非常欣賞他的多功能性，已經點名要求球會簽下這名巴西球員。

The Red Devils have moved ahead in the race to sign the Spain international, but their offer is yet to be accepted by Real Madrid

Alvaro Morata and Manchester United are waiting for Real Madrid's decision on whether to sell the striker, his agent has confirmed.

Lindelof a statement signing for Mourinho

United have been heavily linked with a move for the Spain international and reportedly had a €60 million bid rejected last week, with Jose Mourinho's side said to be planning a new offer.

Morata fuelled speculation he could be set to join United by 'liking' an Instagram post reporting the link on Sunday, with Juanma Lopez acknowledging the Old Trafford option is intriguing for his client.

"Manchester United? They are a club with great glamour, a very interesting option," Lopez said to CalcioMercato.com.

"I can say that their proposal is a very, very important one and now the decision rests with Real. I cannot say [if a deal will be closed soon] – we will see."
AC Milan were also interested in Morata, with Lopez revealing their offer simply fell short before they instead opted to sign Porto striker Andre Silva.

"Yes, there was frequent contact with us until a few days ago – I can confirm that," added Morata's representative.

"Quite simply, Real Madrid considered the Rossoneri's offer to be unsatisfactory."

Morata only started 14 Liga games last season, with Lopez revealing last week that his client wanted to find a situation where he would play a bigger role.

Juventus are reportedly weighing up a bid for Paris Saint-Germain right-back Serge Aurier, who would replace Dani Alves.

According to Calciomercato.com, Juve are “seriously” thinking about Aurier, who made just 22 Ligue 1 appearances for PSG last season due to injury and the emergence of Thomas Meunier.

The website adds Tottenham Hotspur are also in the race for the Ivorian, but the Bianconeri have already enquired about the Ivorian’s availability, with Alves seemingly set for the Premier League.

However, a stumbling block for Juve is his character, given he was arrested after an altercation with two police officers and directed homophobic slurs at former Coach Laurent Blanc last year.

Nonetheless, Calciomercato notes Aurier could leave Parc des Princes for a fee of €10-15m, making him an affordable option.

Juventus have started negotiations for Matteo Darmian to replace Dani Alves, but Manchester United want €18-20m.

With Dani Alves ready to reunite with Pep Guardiola at Manchester City, the Bianconeri need a suitable right-back for next season.

According to Sky Sport Italia, Juve contacted Manchester United today in order to ask for information on Darmian.

The Italy international struggled for regular playing time at Old Trafford since his €18m move from Torino in the summer of 2015.

He is under contract until 2019, with an option for another year, and Manchester United want to make back their money, so will sell him for €18-20m.

Darmian had already attracted interest from Inter in January and this summer.

Juventus have offered €45m for Federico Bernardeschi, claim Sportitalia, very close to Fiorentina’s €50m asking price.

The Italy international is currently playing in the European Under-21 Championship.

His current contract is due to expire in 2018, but he has so far refused to pen an extension, so time is running out to make a decision on his future.

Fiorentina are believed to be asking for €50m and it seems as if Juventus have come closest to that with €45m.

This beats the proposal put forward so far by Inter and Bayern Munich.

Bernardeschi would also prefer to join Juve, but the Viola face a potential fan revolt if they sell to their arch rivals.

Sportitalia pundit Alfredo Pedullà insists Bernardeschi would be signed even if Juventus also strike a deal with Bayern Munich for Douglas Costa.

Negotiations there have stalled, as Bayern won’t budge from the €50m request and the Bianconeri offered €40m.

Brazilian reports claim Juventus are close to a deal for Nice left-back Dalbert, which would free up Alex Sandro for Chelsea.

According to Globoesporte.com, the Old Lady are at a very advanced stage of negotiations with both the French club and the player’s entourage.

Dalbert had already been heavily linked with Inter, but they were not prepared to meet the €15m asking price.

That would not be an issue for Juve, but above all the arrival of one Brazilian left-back would mean the exit of another – Alex Sandro.

“A substantial offer has arrived for Alex Sandro,” confirmed director general Beppe Marotta today.

“We have no intention of selling anyone, but if a player decides to leave, as has happened in previous years, then at the end of the day he has to go, because we don’t keep anyone against their will.

“But at the moment there are no such situations and I hope nobody will leave.”

If the reports of advanced Dalbert talks are true, then Juventus are preparing the groundwork for a potential Alex Sandro exit, especially if the rumours of a €60m offer turn out to be accurate.

The 23-year-old has a contract with OGC Nice until 2021 and has also attracted interest from the likes of Sporting CP and Inter.

Reports in France say Serge Aurier wants to leave Paris Saint-Germain, with Juventus interested in signing him.

The Bianconeri need a new right-back, as Dani Alves is terminating his contract to join Manchester City.

According to France Football, they have turned their attention to Aurier, the Ivorian international who made 22 Ligue 1 appearances last season.

While it’s believed PSG are willing to offer a new three-year contract, Le Parisien reports that the 24-year-old has made it clear he wants to leave, as he’s not on the same wavelength as Coach Unai Emery.

Sporting director Antero Henrique has already said that he doesn’t keep players against their will, though sources suggest Juve may have had a first bid turned down at the end of last week.

Madrid reject Juve's Danilo offer

Real Madrid have rejected an opening offer from Italian champions Juventus for full back Danilo, according to reports.

Diario AS have followed up on reports in La Gazzetta Dello Sport which state the Bianconeri lodged a bid of €15m for the Brazilian defender, although Madrid are hopeful of reclaiming more of the €31m they paid FC Porto in 2015.

Los Blancos are said by AS to be holding out for a minimum of €25m for the 25-year-old although even with add-ons, it appears unlikely Juve will increase their offer to such a level.

Max Allegri’s side are on the lookout for a new right back after Dani Alves terminated his contract at the club as he looks set to join Manchester City.

Danilo has made 40 La Liga appearances across two seasons at the Bernabeu but has failed to impress in his stint, where he has largely been an understudy to Dani Carvajal.

Bernardeschi to Juve next week?

Juventus are expected to offer €40m plus a player for Fiorentina star Federico Bernardeschi next week, claim multiple reports.

According to The Corriere dello Sport, Tuttosport and La Nazione, an offer will be presented by Monday or Tuesday at the latest.

There will be a cash sum of up to €40m plus a player in part-exchange, likely to be Stefano Sturaro or Tomas Rincon.

The Viola set a €50m price-tag on the talent, who is fresh from an impressive European Under-21 Championship performance.

He refused to sign a contract renewal and so is expected to be sold this summer.

Chelsea, Inter, Paris Saint-Germain and Bayern Munich had also shown a strong interest in the 23-year-old, who can play a variety of forward and wide roles.

It’s believed Juve pinpointed Bernardeschi after failing to lower Bayern Munich’s €50m asking price for Douglas Costa.

Juventus are expected to offer €40m plus a player for Fiorentina star Federico Bernardeschi next week, claim multiple reports.

According to The Corriere dello Sport, Tuttosport and La Nazione, an offer will be presented by Monday or Tuesday at the latest.

There will be a cash sum of up to €40m plus a player in part-exchange, likely to be Stefano Sturaro or Tomas Rincon.

The Viola set a €50m price-tag on the talent, who is fresh from an impressive European Under-21 Championship performance.

He refused to sign a contract renewal and so is expected to be sold this summer.

Chelsea, Inter, Paris Saint-Germain and Bayern Munich had also shown a strong interest in the 23-year-old, who can play a variety of forward and wide roles.

It’s believed Juve pinpointed Bernardeschi after failing to lower Bayern Munich’s €50m asking price for Douglas Costa.

Del Piero: Dybala for Juve No 10

Alessandro Del Piero says it is “strange” to see Juventus’ No 10 jersey vacant but would like to see it filled by Paulo Dybala.

Juve played without a designated 10 last season due to the departure of Paul Pogba, but while they have been linked with a self-proclaimed ‘fantasista’ in Federico Bernardeschi, Del Piero feels there is only one Bianconeri player currently worthy of the shirt.

“It’s strange not to see that jersey, even if the world has changed so much,” the iconic attacker told Calciomercato.com.

“Juve’s No 10 shirt is heavy and important: not just for me, but for Sivori, Platini, Baggio...

“I’d like Dybala to wear it, but he’s happy with 21, which is another number with history behind it.

“Bernardeschi? He would be a great signing. I like the attitude in his game because his technical characteristics and qualities are pretty clear.

“He’s a lad who has already shown to have great qualities and Juve has always been a very inviting environment, albeit a difficult and challenging one with big responsibilities, where you can only afford to go a bit wrong.”

According to Gazzetta dello Sport, Juve are ready to offer Bernardeschi a five-year contract worth €4m a season after tax, but they are only prepared to pay €40m for the winger.

Although Fiorentina want €40m up front, they are also seeking another €10m in bonuses or Italy Under-20 starlet Riccardo Orsolini in return.

The Bianconeri, on the other hand, are only willing to offer midfielders Tomas Rincon and Stefano Sturaro or Orsolini on loan.

Max Allegri is said to be “pushing” for the Brazilian’s signature, with the player also keen on the move.

However, given the Old Lady can sign just one more non-EU player, the Bayern Munich man joining would mean Danilo and Serge Aurier cannot.

Di Marzio adds there was another meeting with Neto’s agent, where it emerged that Juve wanted to sell the goalkeeper to Watford.

The Hornets are proposing a higher transfer fee, but the shot-stopper’s preference remains Valencia.

Juve: Bernardeschi and Douglas Costa

Juventus are reportedly just days away from securing both Douglas Costa from Bayern Munich and Fiorentina’s Federico Bernardeschi.

According to La Stampa and Tuttosport, negotiations are moving apace for both wingers.

Sky Sport Italia had already stated last night that Juve were closer than ever to Douglas Costa, offering €40m plus significant bonuses.

Crucially, Bayern Munich seem prepared to accept it as a loan with obligation to buy at the end of the season, thus spreading the cost out over a couple of years.

Fiorentina confirmed this week that Bernardeschi had put in a transfer request and it has long been maintained the player wants a Juventus move.

The deal appears to be essentially done for €40m plus bonuses and a player, likely to be Tomas Rincon, although other options include Stefano Sturaro and the loan of Riccardo Orsolini.

Juventus want to spread the payment over three years, whereas the Viola would prefer a lump sum.

Juventus choose Cancelo

Juventus are turning their focus towards Valencia right-back Joao Cancelo, dropping interest in Serge Aurier and Danilo.

The Bianconeri need a replacement for Dani Alves, who terminated his contract by mutual consent after just one season and is due to sign for Manchester City.

Danilo of Real Madrid and Paris Saint-Germain talent Aurier had been the initial objectives, but the situation has since shifted.

According to various sources, including La Gazzetta dello Sport, Cancelo is now the hot favourite for a Turin switch.

The 23-year-old would still cost €25m, but Juve already have a good rapport with Valencia after selling goalkeeper Norberto Neto yesterday.

Cancelo is a Portugal international with three goals in just four senior caps and can play in a variety of roles down the right flank.

Valencia only bought him from Benfica two years ago for €15m.

拜仁慕尼黑對D.哥斯達的標價為5000萬歐元，祖雲達斯此前的報價為4000萬歐元外加浮動獎金，獎金的具體數額與D.哥斯達的出場次數相掛鈎。

這筆交易現在有了新進展，祖雲達斯越來越接近簽下D.哥斯達，他們向拜仁慕尼黑提出了先租後買的請求。

意大利《天空體育》表示，祖雲達斯還有可能引進費倫天拿的貝拿迪斯治，這位意大利國腳能夠勝任前場多個位置，不排除斑馬軍團在今夏同時引進D.哥斯達和貝拿迪斯治的可能性。

消息参考来源: football-italia

Juventus are slamming the door on Alex Sandro unless Chelsea or Paris Saint-Germain offer over €70m.

The only exception would be if someone were to come in with a bid worth a minimum of €70-75m.

Meanwhile, Juve are asking Alex Sandro to sign a new contract to June 2022, adding two years to his current deal.
